ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the sport's logo or image */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity metric for the sport */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sport was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sport's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the league's logo or image */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the league was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the league's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match is played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, live, finished) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the match was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the match's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bookmaker */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the bookmaker's logo or image */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the bookmaker's website */,
  "rating" REAL /* User rating for the bookmaker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the bookmaker was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the bookmaker's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odd */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker */,
  "odd_value" REAL /* Value of the odd */,
  "odd_type" TEXT /* Type of the odd (e.g., win, draw, lose) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the odds were added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the odds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user's profile */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login to the user's account */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is an admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the prediction */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of the prediction (e.g., win, draw, lose) */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakes" (
  "stake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stake */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the stake */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "stake_value" REAL /* Value of the stake */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the stake was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the stake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakes_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., win, draw, lose) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payouts" (
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payout */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the payout */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "payout_value" REAL /* Value of the payout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the payout was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the payout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payouts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payouts_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the leaderboard (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "leaderboard_value" REAL /* Value of the leaderboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the leaderboard entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., win, draw, lose) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., notification, leaderboard) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the setting was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the review */,
  "review_message" TEXT /* Message of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was left */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* User rating for the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
